seoTitle: Wangi Wangi vs Wantagong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wangi Wangi and Wantagong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wangi Wangi vs Wantagong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wangi Wangi and Wantagong.
heading: Wangi Wangi vs Wantagong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wangi Wangi, New South Wales and Wantagong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wantagong has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Wangi Wangi (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wangi Wangi or Wantagong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wangi Wangi has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Wantagong scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wangi Wangi scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Wantagong scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wangi Wangi or Wantagong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wantagong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
